RuleSet.Name: src/schemaprotobj/ISchemaProtTableObj.java

GenFile.Name: reallyFileISchemaProtTableObjJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$prot/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$protobj

RuleSet.GenRule: boolean $leadlower Name$($iterate Params( first declProtServerMethodParamNoComma each declProtServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
boolean $leadlower Name$( I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj obj$iterate Params( each declProtServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference RetTable Name$Obj $leadlower Name$($iterate Params( first declProtServerMethodParamNoComma each declProtServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference RetTable Name$Obj $leadlower Name$( I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj obj$iterate Params( each declProtServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
List<I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference RetTable Name$Obj> $leadlower Name$($iterate Params( first declProtServerMethodParamNoComma each declProtServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
List<I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference RetTable Name$Obj> $leadlower Name$( I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj obj$iterate Params( each declProtServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );

$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex declProtTableObjReadByThisPrimaryIndex$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declProtTableObjReadByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declProtTableObjReadByThisNonPrimaryIndex )$
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declProtTableObjReadByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declProtTableObjReadByInhNonPrimaryIndex )$

/** * Get the $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instance for the unique $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj cached instance for the unique $Suffix$ key, or * null if no such instance exists. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$($iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Get the $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instance for the unique $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj refreshed instance for the unique $Suffix$ key, or * null if no such instance exists. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$($iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );

/** * Get the $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instance for the primary key attributes.$reference Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj cached instance for the primary key, or * null if no such instance exists. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj read$poptop Table TableName$By$reference Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Get the $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instance for the primary key attributes.$reference Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj refreshed instance for the primary key, or * null if no such instance exists. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj read$poptop Table TableName$By$reference Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );

/** * Get the $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instance for the unique $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj cached instance for the unique $Suffix$ key, or * null if no such instance exists. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Get the $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instance for the unique $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj refreshed instance for the unique $Suffix$ key, or * null if no such instance exists. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );

/** * Get the map of $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return List of $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj cached instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key, * which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj> read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Get the map of $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return List of $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj cached instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key, * which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj> read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );

/** * Get the map of $DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return List of $poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj cached instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key, * which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj> read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Get the map of $poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return List of $poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj cached instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key, * which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj> read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );

/** * Construct an appropriate subclass instance based on the specified class code. * * @param backingClassCode The backing store class code used to identify the proposed instance class. * * @return I$SchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instance, which may be a subclass of a $TableName$ instance. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj constructByClassCode( int backingClassCode );

/** * Return a sorted list of all the $TableName$-derived instances in the database. * * @return List of I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instance, sorted by their primary keys, which * may include an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj> readAll$poptop Table TableName$();
/** * Return a sorted map of all the $TableName$-derived instances in the database. * * @return List of I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instance, sorted by their primary keys, which * may include an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj> readAll$poptop Table TableName$( boolean forceRead );

/** * Return a sorted map of a page of the $TableName$-derived instances in the database. * * @return List of I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj instance, sorted by their primary keys, which * may include an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj> pageAll$poptop Table TableName$($reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first declProtOptPriorArg each declProtCommaOptPriorArg )$ );

/** * Read a $TableName$-derived instance by it's primary key. * * @param pkey The primary key identifying the instance to read. * * @return The $TableName$-derived instance identified by the primary key, * or null if no such key value exists. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj read$TableName$( $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ pkey );
/** * Read a $TableName$-derived instance by it's primary key. * * @param pkey The primary key identifying the instance to read. * * @return The $TableName$-derived instance identified by the primary key, * or null if no such key value exists. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj read$TableName$( $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ pkey, boolean forceRead );

/** * Read a $TableName$-derived instance by it's primary key. * * @return The $TableName$-derived instance identified by the primary key, * or null if no such key value exists. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj read$TableName$( $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Read a $TableName$-derived instance by it's primary key. * * @return The $TableName$-derived instance identified by the primary key, * or null if no such key value exists. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj read$TableName$( $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );

/** * Read a List of $TableName$-derived instances sorted by their primary keys, * as identified by the duplicate $Suffix$ key attributes.$iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return A List of $TableName$-derived instances sorted by their primary keys, * as identified by the key attributes, which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj> read$TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Read a List of $TableName$-derived instances sorted by their primary keys, * as identified by the duplicate $Suffix$ key attributes.$iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return A List of $TableName$-derived instances sorted by their primary keys, * as identified by the key attributes, which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj> read$TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declProtTableObjPageByInhIndex default empty$$iterate Index( each declProtTableObjPageByThisNonPrimaryIndex )$

/** * Read a page of data as a List of $TableName$-derived instances sorted by their primary keys, * as identified by the duplicate $Suffix$ key attributes.$iterate Columns( each implProtCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return A List of $TableName$-derived instances sorted by their primary keys, * as identified by the key attributes, which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj> page$TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$$poptop Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declProtCommaOptPriorArg )$ );

$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex declProtTableObjDeleteByThisPrimaryIndex$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declProtTableObjDeleteByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declProtTableObjDeleteByThisNonPrimaryIndex )$
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declProtTableObjDeleteByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declProtTableObjDeleteByInhNonPrimaryIndex )$

$declProtTableObjReadCachedByPrimaryIndex$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declProtTableObjReadCachedByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declProtTableObjReadCachedByThisNonPrimaryIndex )$
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declProtTableObjReadCachedByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declProtTableObjReadCachedByInhNonPrimaryIndex )$
I$DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj readCached$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );
List<I$DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj> readCached$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );
List<I$DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$Obj> readCached$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );

$declProtTableObjDeepDisposeByPrimaryIndex$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declProtTableObjDeepDisposeByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declProtTableObjDeepDisposeByThisNonPrimaryIndex )$
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declProtTableObjDeepDisposeByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declProtTableObjDeepDisposeByInhNonPrimaryIndex )$
void deepDispose$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );
void deepDispose$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );
public void deepDispose$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declProtColumnArg each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );
